commit.message:
Implement simple variable interpolation for string literals.

e.g. in the string "value is :{v}", the string ":{v}" is replaced with the
symbol v's value at runtime. Complex interpolation (i.e. full expressions)
are not yet supported. Interpolation only happens in strings defined as
literals, i.e. it won't occur for concatenating "value is :{" and  "v}".

Closes #1.

Revert Jison to 0.4.13

Jison releases later than 0.4.13 cause exceptions to be thrown when parsing
any code. Reverted to 0.4.13 as an easy fix.

Various improvements:
  - Fix incorrect 'break' behaviour
  - Better parsing of array indices
  - Full programs test:
     - Brainfuck interpreter
Implement better formatting of printed arrays.
Add flakey initial support for setting/getting array indices.

Fix problems dealing with EOLs.

No longer rely on the initial tokenizer to collapse blank lines into a single
EOL; blank lines can be created by the parser when stripping out comments.

Therefore the parser can now handle blank lines fine itself.

Loosen loop syntax - don't require the identifier to end a loop.

i.e. In:  IM OUTTA YR <loop>, <loop> is optional.

Implement setIo functions.

Allow caller to override the IO methods (prompt, visible).
Fix exception evaluating watch expressions when no stack is present.

Improvements:
	- Better CPU use - no longer poll for the 'paused' property to
		turn false.
	- Evaluation of watch statements.
	- Error reporting.
	- Position reporting.
	- MOD OF operator.
	- Allow EOL to be an argument list terminator.

Various improvements

   - onDone and onPaused are now passed as callbacks to the constructor
   - Better stack management:
       - Builtin function calls are noted on the stack.
       - Pop makes it harder to pop the wrong state.
   - Current node is stored so the caller can see where the program is.
   - Recognise breakpoint statements
Make the interpreter's evaluation process interruptable, i.e. asynchronous.

Implement some features, refactorings.

Implement:
	- Loops,
	- Casting,
	- Escape sequences

Refactor AST nodes to use inheritance.

Initial commit.

Many things work. Some things don't.
